summary: Frontend testing of Google Maps PlaceSearch integration for itinerary planning. All 5 features tested successfully: PlaceSearch component loads, modal shows 3 columns (Roteiro, Buscar Lugares, Assistente IA), search returns results with map markers, place selection works with add-to-itinerary option, and places can be added to itinerary with time selection.

issues: Google Maps API deprecation warnings in console - PlacesService will be deprecated, should migrate to google.maps.places.Place
google.maps.Marker deprecated - should migrate to google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement
open_now property deprecated - should use isOpen() method

place_search_component_loads.details: PlaceSearch.jsx component loads correctly with search input, type filters (Restaurantes, Cafés, Atrações, etc.), and search button

modal_shows_3_columns.details: EventItinerary modal displays 3 columns: Roteiro (left), Buscar Lugares (middle), Assistente IA (right) with proper tab navigation

search_returns_results.details: Search for 'Times Square, New York' returned 10 place cards with photos, ratings, price levels, and open/closed status

place_selection_works.details: Clicking on a place card selects it (green checkmark), shows 'Ver no Maps' and 'Adicionar ao Roteiro' buttons

map_renders_with_markers.details: Mini map renders with dark theme, shows markers for all found places, selected place marker is highlighted

add_to_itinerary_flow.details: Time modal opens with place name, address, date, and time picker. Confirming adds activity to itinerary and shows success message in AI chat

action_items: FUTURE: Migrate from google.maps.places.PlacesService to google.maps.places.Place (new API)
FUTURE: Migrate from google.maps.Marker to google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement
FUTURE: Replace open_now with isOpen() method for opening hours
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps API key is hardcoded in PlaceSearch.jsx - should be moved to environment variable
PlacesService is deprecated as of March 2025 but still functional - migration recommended for future
Component handles loading states and errors gracefully
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Added 'Park Lane Hotel New York' activity to Viagem NYC itinerary on 17 de abr. at 14:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps PlaceSearch integration is fully working. The component uses deprecated APIs (PlacesService, Marker, open_now) that still function but should be migrated in the future. Test data: Added Park Lane Hotel to NYC trip itinerary.

deprecation_warnings: PlacesService deprecated March 2025 - use Place instead
Marker deprecated February 2024 - use AdvancedMarkerElement instead
open_now deprecated November 2019 - use isOpen() instead
google_maps_api_notes.functionality_status: All features working despite deprecation warnings
